calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nora Aponte-Woodring appeared by zoom for Christine Watson (petitioner).
Kelly Dixon appeared by zoom for and with Daniel Cunningham by zoom.

Mrs. Woodring stated that Jennifer Fex died intestate and that all of her heirs have been given notice. Mrs. Dixon had nothing to add. The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
